name: mobile-startup-studio
description: Cross-functional mobile startup team for coordinated product, engineering, launch, and growth work.

interface.shortDescription: Parallel startup team for mobile apps
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin that models a successful app startup as a coordinated set of product, architecture, iOS, Android, Expo, Supabase, design, QA, analytics, research, ASO, growth, and social roles. Use the coordinator skill to run full-company sessions or pull in only the specialists a task needs.
defaultPrompt: Run a full-company planning session for a new mobile feature
Split a launch task across iOS, Android, Supabase, QA, and growth
Launch a persistent startup swarm for a complex mobile initiative
